name: Cherry Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, salt, and baking powder; set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs; beat well.
4. Stir in milk and vanilla extract.
5. Add flour mixture; thoroughly combine.
6. Stir in nuts, dates, and 1/3 cup chopped cherries.
7. Portion dough using a level measuring tablespoon.
8. Shape into balls and roll in crushed corn flakes.
9. Place about 2 inches apart on greased baking sheets.
10. Top each cookie with a cherry quarter.
11. Bake in a 375 degree oven for about 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
12. Remove immediately from baking sheets and cool on wire racks.
